2605.19418.title: Conflict-Resilient Multi-Agent Reasoning via Signed Graph Modeling
2605.19418.paper_summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have demonstrated strong reasoning and decision-making capabilities that consistently surpass those of single LLM agents. However, their performance often suffers from naive aggregation mechanisms that assume uniformly cooperative interactions. Upon close inspection, we observe that existing graph-based MAS frameworks (1) propagate errors when conflicting signals arise without control, and (2) lack explicit modeling of conflicting inter-agent relations as well as structural awareness, failing to identify reliable interaction patterns. To bridge this gap, we introduce SIGMA, a novel SIgned Graph-informed Multi-Agent reasoning framework that explicitly captures trust, conflict, and neutral relations among agents via a signed relational graph. Specifically, given a query, SIGMA first selects a set of relevant and diverse agents, then constructs a structured signed interaction graph with confidence-weighted edges. Reasoning proceeds through conflict-aware signed message passing, which reinforces information from trustworthy agents while suppressing conflicting signals, and terminates with a structure- and conflict-aware weighted aggregation to yield globally consistent and conflict-resilient predictions. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets, across multiple LLM backbones and diverse multi-agent configurations, demonstrate that SIGMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving notable gains in both accuracy and conflict-resilient performance.
2605.19418.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基礎的多代理系統 (MAS) 展現了強大的推理和決策能力，這些能力持續超越單一 LLM 代理的表現。然而，它們的性能常常受到天真的聚合機制的影響，這些機制假設互動是均勻合作的。仔細檢查後，我們觀察到現有的基於圖的 MAS 框架 (1) 在出現衝突信號時無法控制地傳播錯誤，以及 (2) 缺乏對衝突的代理間關係的明確建模和結構意識，無法識別可靠的互動模式。為了填補這一空白，我們引入了 SIGMA，一個新穎的簽名圖資訊多代理推理框架，通過簽名關係圖明確捕捉代理之間的信任、衝突和中立關係。具體而言，給定一個查詢，SIGMA 首先選擇一組相關且多樣的代理，然後構建一個具有信心加權邊的結構化簽名互動圖。推理通過衝突感知的簽名消息傳遞進行，這一過程加強了來自可信代理的信息，同時抑制了衝突信號，並以結構和衝突感知的加權聚合結束，以產生全局一致且抗衝突的預測。在六個基準數據集上的廣泛實驗，涵蓋多個 LLM 主幹和多樣的多代理配置，顯示 SIGMA 始終超越最先進的基準，實現了在準確性和抗衝突性能方面的顯著提升。
2605.19418.author: Longgang He et.al.
2605.19418.authors: Longgang He, Longzhu He, Daojing He, Chaozhuo Li
